ddls:
CREATE TABLE "social_media_posts" (
  "post_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each social media post */,
  "post_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the post was published */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author who made the post */,
  "author_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the author */,
  "post_message" TEXT /* Content of the post */,
  "status_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the status of the post */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Social media channel where the post was made */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., inquiry, complaint, feedback) */,
  "sentiment_score" TEXT /* Sentiment score of the post */,
  "response_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the customer service response */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Customer service representative who created the post entry */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* Last customer service representative who modified the post entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_posts_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES post_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_posts_sentiment_score FOREIGN KEY ("sentiment_score") REFERENCES sentiment_scores ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_posts_response_id FOREIGN KEY ("response_id") REFERENCES customer_service_responses ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_media_posts_interaction_type FOREIGN KEY ("interaction_type") REFERENCES interaction_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_status" (
  "status_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_type" TEXT /* Type of status (e.g., open, closed, escalated) */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Customer service representative who created the status entry */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* Last customer service representative who modified the status entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_service_responses" (
  "response_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer service response */,
  "post_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the corresponding social media post */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the response was made */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer service representative who made the response */,
  "author_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the customer service representative */,
  "response_message" TEXT /* Content of the response */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Customer service representative who created the response entry */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* Last customer service representative who modified the response entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_service_responses_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES social_media_posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interaction_categories" (
  "category_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each interaction category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the interaction category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the interaction category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_scores" (
  "sentiment_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each sentiment score */,
  "sentiment_score" TEXT /* Sentiment score (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "sentiment_description" TEXT /* Description of the sentiment score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "post_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the corresponding social media post */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., urgent, critical) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Customer service representative who created the alert entry */,
  "last_modified_by" TEXT /* Last customer service representative who modified the alert entry */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Last modification date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES social_media_posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user access entry */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "role_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
